page_metadata.biotools__summary: ProteinART is a web tool that uses combinatorial optimization for protein inference from tandem mass spectrometry peptide identifications. It uses a set of confidently identified peptides, peptide detectability, and a protein database to provide the most likely set of identified proteins.
